blueprint.name: Volume Knob (Zigbee2MQTT)
blueprint.description: Control media player volume with a Zigbee2MQTT rotary knob (e.g. IKEA SYMFONISK). Rotation controls volume with acceleration support, and button presses can be configured for mute, play/pause, or power toggle.
input.z2m_device_topic.name: Zigbee2MQTT device name
input.z2m_device_topic.description: The friendly name of the device in Zigbee2MQTT (used as the MQTT topic).
input.media_players.name: Media player(s)
input.media_players.description: One or more media players to control with the knob.
input.button_settings.name: Button actions
input.single_click_action.name: Single click
input.single_click_action.description: Action to perform on a single click.
input.double_click_action.name: Double click
input.double_click_action.description: Action to perform on a double click.
input.long_press_action.name: Long press
input.long_press_action.description: Action to perform on a long press.
condition.players_available.alias: At least one media player is available
